channel.title: Trade Management on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Trade Management on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: AI tools for contractors and tradespeople top picks in 2026
item.description: What Is AI Tools for Contractors and Tradespeople? AI tools for contractors and tradespeople are software solutions designed to automate and streamline various tasks, improving efficiency and productivity in the construction industry. These tools use artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms to analyze data, predict trends, and provide insights that help contractors and tradespeople make informed decisions. For example, AI-powered scheduling tools can optimize project timelines, reduce delays, and improve communication with clients.
